security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: blob: https:; media-src 'self' blob: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; font-src 'self' data:; worker-src 'self' blob:; frame-src https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com https://player.vimeo.com; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost blob: https://oauth2.googleapis.com https://www.googleapis.com

bundle.shortDescription: Glassy Markdown notes synced to Google Drive.
bundle.longDescription: Stela is a minimalist, glassy Markdown note-taking app with smooth caret animation, bilingual FR/EN spell checking, LaTeX, voice notes and video, with Google Drive as the source of truth.
